methodology.term_list_source: pipeline.opportunity_filter.AI_INFRA_TERMS (250 terms, single source of truth with the live filter)
methodology.matching: normalized phrase substring match over keyword + news titles (identical to pipeline._ai_infra_hits)
methodology.dedup: cross-geo dedup keeps highest-traffic copy (identical to pipeline)
methodology.interval: Poisson 95% CI via Wilson–Hilferty approximation, scaled to per-week
methodology.caveat: each snapshot-day is one point-in-time RSS sample (~25 trends/geo), NOT the full day's trend flow; true daily supply is likely higher, so this baseline is a conservative lower-bound estimate

weekly_supply_estimate.unit: ai-infra briefings per week (lower-bound sampling, see caveat)
